svg.title: Site Manpower System Roadmap
svg.desc: Three phases: Now, Next, and Future for site manpower management system

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I remove site location from the manpower logger?')
sendPrompt('How do I add remarks field to the manpower logger?')
sendPrompt('How do I add planned headcount to compare vs actual?')
sendPrompt('How do I add Excel export to the manpower logger?')
sendPrompt('How do I auto-format the WhatsApp message for multiple group chats?')
sendPrompt('How would a worker roster with IDs work in the manpower app?')
sendPrompt('How would leave tracking work tied to individual workers?')
g.text: MC, AL, HL logged by name —

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would dormitory headcount work as a tab?')
sendPrompt('How would OT approval flow work — request then PM approves?')
sendPrompt('How would monthly planned vs actual chart work for the project manager?')
sendPrompt('What would a manpower trend dashboard look like?')
sendPrompt('How would payroll export with OT hours work?')
sendPrompt('What would worker attendance history look like?')

svg.text: Your current pain: 4+ WhatsApp groups, no history, PM has to ask around manually

g.text: One Streamlit app — single link shared in all groups
Everyone reads and writes from the same data
